values.description: Root domain — no trailing slash. Example: http://localhost:8080 | https://staging.yourdomain.com
Bearer token for a standard non-partner user. Auto-populated after login.
Bearer token for a user with user_type = 'partner' or 'channel partner' or 'franchise'. Used in 403 tests.
Bearer token for a user who has a non-null ref_id in manage_users. Used in referral commission tests.
Auto-populated from List All Packages (first non-Freemium package p_id).
p_id of the LifeTime package in your DB. Update if different.
p_id of a package with status != 1 in your DB. Used in inactive package 404 test.
Auto-populated from Calculate Package Price. Used as amount in purchase requests.
Auto-populated from Get Transaction History (first tid in list).
Auto-populated from Purchase Membership response (invoice_no field).
Real Razorpay sandbox payment_id (starts with 'pay_'). Get from Razorpay test dashboard after a sandbox payment.
Real Razorpay sandbox order_id (starts with 'order_'). Create via Razorpay Orders API before checkout.
HMAC-SHA256 signature returned by Razorpay on payment success. 64-char hex string.
A razorpay_payment_id that already exists in membership_transactions. Used in 409 duplicate test.
Razorpay signature matching the duplicate payment above.
SLA in milliseconds. Collection-level test enforces this on every request.
